# Sitemap Checklist

```md
- [ ] `sitemap.xml` is NOT hand-edited (generated by build step)
- [ ] Generator: `scripts/node/generate-sitemap.js` + `build/generateSitemap.js`
- [ ] New indexable page → entry appears after `npm run build`
- [ ] `noindex` pages are excluded from sitemap
- [ ] `lastmod` reflects actual page update date
- [ ] `priority` differentiates hubs (1.0), top-level pages (0.8), long-tail (0.5–0.6)
- [ ] `changefreq` matches reality (homepage `daily`, content `monthly`, methodology `yearly`)
- [ ] Sitemap covers EN and AR variants where applicable
- [ ] `npm run validate` (sitemap coverage check) PASS
- [ ] After deploy: sitemap.xml accessible at `https://goldtickerlive.com/sitemap.xml`
- [ ] Submitted to Search Console / Bing Webmaster (manual operator step)
```
